voxy.config.title: Voxy
voxy.config.general.serviceThreads.toolt: Number of threads the ServiceThreadPool can use
voxy.config.general.useSodiumBuilder.too: Uses sodium builder threads as part of voxys thread pool, can reduce stuttering and lag when moving quickly at high render distance
voxy.config.general.ingest.tooltip: Enables or disables voxies ability to convert new chunks into LoDs
voxy.config.general.subDivisionSize.tool: Maximum size in pixels (squared) of screenspace AABB before subdiving to smaller LoDs (Smaller being higher quality)
voxy.config.general.renderDistance.toolt: Render distance of voxy in chunks
voxy.config.general.environmental_fog.to: Enables or disables voxy rendering environmental fog
voxy.config.general.render_fog.tooltip: Enables or disables render fog effect
voxy.config.general.render_statistics.to: Enable render statistics in F3 menu, useful for debugging
voxy.sodium.page.title: Voxy
voxy.sodium.option.enabled.tooltip: Master switch to enable or disable the Voxy LOD system
voxy.sodium.option.enable_rendering.tool: Enable rendering of LOD terrain. Disable to keep data ingestion running without visual output.
voxy.sodium.option.ingest_enabled.toolti: Enable automatic conversion of visited chunks into LOD data
voxy.sodium.option.render_distance.toolt: How far LOD terrain renders. Value is multiplied by 32 to get chunk distance. Example: 16 = 512 chunks.
voxy.sodium.option.service_threads.toolt: Number of background threads for LOD processing. More threads = faster LOD generation but higher CPU usage.
voxy.sodium.option.subdivision_size.tool: Maximum screen-space size before subdividing to higher detail LODs. Lower = more detail but more GPU work.
voxy.sodium.option.environmental_fog.too: Apply environmental fog effects to LOD terrain
voxy.sodium.option.dont_use_sodium_threa: Don't share threads with Sodium's chunk builder. Enable if you experience stuttering.
voxy.sodium.option.lod_boundary_buffer.t: Controls overlap between vanilla chunks and LODs. Higher = smoother transitions when flying fast, but slight overdraw.
voxy.config.fakesight.enabled.tooltip: Request chunks beyond vanilla render distance from the server for LOD ingestion
voxy.config.fakesight.distance.tooltip: Chunk distance to request from the server (8-127 chunks)
voxy.sodium.option.render_statistics.too: Show LOD render statistics in the F3 debug screen
voxy.sodium.option.earth_curve_ratio.too: Simulates standing on a spherical planet. 0 = flat world. Higher values = smaller planet effect (more curvature). Inspired by Distant Horizons.
